# Read the text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-KmKTcBncG5ghXAB1ihkFec-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:3000]

text = open("/mnt/data/file-KmKTcBncG5ghXAB1ihkFec-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()
print(text)
# Find occurrences of quoted segments
import re
for m in re.finditer(r'“([^”]+)”|"([^"]+)"|«([^»]+)»', text):
    span = m.span()
    content = m.group(1) or m.group(2) or m.group(3)
    # The content indices relative to text: between quotes.
    # Need to compute start index of content: span[0]+1 etc depending on quote char length.
    # But simpler: find the content within text
    # We'll search content occurrence near
    start = text.find(content, span[0], span[1])
    print("Quoted content:", content)
    print("Start:", start, "End:", start+len(content))
